text:
[Name of child] | [Girl] / [Boy] | [dd/mm/yy]

Surname: [surname]

Forenames in full: [forename(s)]

National Insurance number: [NI number]

Female/Male  (please tick) 			□ Female		□ Male

Date of birth (or, if not known, approximate age): [dob/age]

Last known address, with date when living there: [address & dates]

Any other known address(es) with dates: [address(es) & dates]

If the person sought is a war pensioner, his/her war pension and service particulars: [war pension & service particulars]

The exact date of the marriage (or civil partnership): [date]

Any previous names: [name(s)]
